debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
h1 : U ∼ V
h2 : ctble U
⊢ ctble V

failed_attempts:
rcases h2 with ⟨g, hg⟩
  refine ⟨(h1.invFun ∘ g), ?_⟩
  intro v
  rcases hg (h1.toFun v) with ⟨n, hn⟩
  refine ⟨n, ?_⟩
  simpa [Function.comp, hn] using congrArg h1.invFun rfl

by
  rcases h2 with ⟨f, hf⟩
  rcases h1 with ⟨g, hg⟩
  refine ⟨g ∘ f, ?_⟩
  intro v
  rcases hg v with ⟨u, rfl⟩
  rcases hf u with ⟨n, rfl⟩
  exact ⟨n, rfl⟩

by
  rcases h1 with ⟨f, g, hfg, hgf⟩
  rcases h2 with ⟨e, he⟩
  refine ⟨fun v => e (g v), ?_⟩
  intro v1 v2 hv
  have : g v1 = g v2 := he hv
  calc
    v1 = f (g v1) := (hfg v1).symm
    _  = f (g v2) := by simpa [this]
    _  = v2 := hfg v2

rcases h1 with ⟨f, ⟨h_inj, h_surj⟩⟩
  rcases h2 with ⟨g, hg⟩
  refine ⟨f ∘ g, ?_⟩
  intro v
  rcases h_surj v with ⟨u, rfl⟩
  rcases hg u with ⟨n, rfl⟩
  exact ⟨n, rfl⟩

rcases h2 with ⟨f, hf⟩
  rcases h1 with ⟨g, hg⟩
  refine ⟨g ∘ f, ?_⟩
  exact Equinumerous.trans hf hg

by
  rcases h1 with ⟨f, hf⟩
  have : V ≲ Nat := by
    have hU : U ≲ Nat := ctble_iff_U_le_Nat.mp h2
    exact le_trans (le_of_iff hf.symm) hU
  exact ctble_iff_U_le_Nat.mpr this

by
  rcases h2 with ⟨g, hg⟩
  rcases h1 with ⟨f, hf⟩
  refine ⟨f ∘ g, ?_⟩
  exact onto_comp hf hg

by
  rcases h2 with ⟨f, hf⟩
  rcases h1 with ⟨g, hg⟩
  refine ⟨f ∘ g, ?_⟩
  exact onto_comp hf hg

rcases h2 with ⟨f, hf⟩

rcases h2 with ⟨f, hf⟩

  refine ⟨g ∘ f, ?_⟩
  intro v
  rcases hg v with ⟨u, rfl⟩
  rcases hf u with ⟨n, rfl⟩
  exact ⟨n, rfl⟩

rcases h1 with ⟨f, hf⟩

by
  rcases h2 with ⟨f, hf⟩
  rcases h1 with ⟨g, hg⟩

  rcases h2 with ⟨f, hf⟩
  rcases h1 with ⟨g, hg⟩

rcases h1 with ⟨f, hf⟩
